title: ‘Ponderosa’ Review: The Great Bill Camp Gives Weight to a Slippery, Nightmarish Black Comedy
summary: One of the great secret weapons of American film and TV in recent years, solid-gold supporting actor Bill Camp gets a rare and fascinating leading showcase in “Ponderosa” — though in committing to Rob Rice’s quietly sinister and wildly peculiar black comedy, no one could accuse him of chasing the s…

title: iQOO starts teasing the Z11i, showcases it in all colors
summary: The iQOO Z11 family already has a lot of members, but one more is coming soon: the Z11i. The brand has just started teasing it in China, revealing its three colorways: Green Peak, Desert Gold, and Ink Shadow.
